zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Moreton於1527年出生在英國爾從萊頓時，她的父親William Moreton54歲，母親Alice Brereton37歲。她於1552年11月22日與Thomas Rhodes在英國越可爾希霍爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1594年8月17日在英國越可爾希霍爾享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦可拉肯維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Moreton于1527年出生在英国爾從萊頓时，她的父亲William Moreton54岁，母亲Alice Brereton37岁。她于1552年11月22日与Thomas Rhodes在英国越可爾希霍爾结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1594年8月17日在英国越可爾希霍爾享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦可拉肯維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Moreton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a double diminutive of   More   2 ‘Moor’. Compare   Moret  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Moreton was born in 1527, in Congleton, Cheshire, England, her father, William Moreton, was 54 and her mother, Alice Brereton, was 37. She married Thomas Rhodes on 22 November 1552, in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 17 August 1594, in Hipperholme, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Clerkenwell, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Moreton est née en 1527, à Congleton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Moreton, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Alice Brereton, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Rhodes le 22 novembre 1552, à Hipperholme, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 août 1594, à Hipperholme, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Clerkenwell, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Moretonが1527年にイギリスチェシュアイアコングレトンで生まれた時，父William Moretonは54歳，母Alice Breretonは37歳であった。1552年11月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒップエロールメでThomas Rhodesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1594年8月17日にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒップエロールメで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンクラーケンウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.Little Moreton, Moreton cum Alcumlow, As: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모레턴 c 알c로
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Moreton(이)가 1527년 영국 체실르 콘글레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Moreton(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Brereton(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1552년 11월 22일 영국 요르크실르 히p홀에서 Thomas Rhodes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1594년 8월 17일 영국 요르크실르 히p홀에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 클레르켄웰에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Rhodes em 22 de novembro de 1552, em Hipperholme, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Little Moreton, Moreton cum Alcumlow, As: моретон кум алкумлоу, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Moreton родилась в 1527 г. в местности конглетон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Moreton было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Brereton, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Rhodes 22 ноября 1552 г. в местности хиппиролм, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 17 августа 1594 г. в местности хиппиролм, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности клиркенвелл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
